products.name: Complete Highstarts
products.descriptor: Complete bungee highstart launch sets with line, parachute, swivel and stake

evidence.snippet: **Complete Highstarts include fluorescent braided nylon line, parachute, snap swivel and a 12" stake. They come wound on a cord reel and are read to take to the field. All you need is your airplane and a hammer.**

products.name: Highstart Bungees
products.descriptor: Mandrel-dipped UV-resistant rubber bungee sets for highstart launchers

evidence.snippet:
**[_Highstart Bungee_](highstart-bungees.html) _are sets for making your own Highstart, or replacing worn out rubber on your Highstart._**
**_This is mandrel dipped rubber tubing with UV inhibitors as well as black pigment to protect it from sunlight exposure. The Highstart bungee comes with connectors at both ends and with 210lb. SS split rings._

products.name: Zipstart Catapults & UAV Bungees
products.descriptor: Assembled catapult bungee launch systems for UAVs and gliders, 1–20 lb range

evidence.snippet: **Zipstart Catapults & UAV Bungees**
**Zipstarts/Catapults are assembled Catapult Bungees for launching gliders and powered planes in the 1lb. to 20lb. range. They are excellent for launching EDF. Jets.**

products.name: Insane Mega Bungee Zip Start (Ins3/4x24)
products.descriptor: High-force catapult bungee for 20+ lb UAVs, develops over 80 lbs launch force

evidence.snippet:
**Item Name:     Insane Mega Bungee set up as a Zip Start**
**Use:     This bungee is for 20lbs and beyond, it can develop over 80lbs. of launch force. Also used in a Y configuration for practicing F3J launches.**
**Item Number:  Ins3/4x24Price:   $160**

products.name: Mega Bungee Zip Start (Mega5/8x24)
products.descriptor: Mid-range catapult bungee for 10–20 lb aircraft, zip-start configuration

evidence.snippet:
**Item Name:     Mega Bungee set up as a Zip Start**
**Use:     This is suitable for airplanes from 10 to 20lbs. and is also used as a "Death Match" bungee for open class gliders.**
**Item Number:  Mega5/8x24Price:   $150**

products.name: 18" Ripstop Nylon Parachute (HSChute)
products.descriptor: 18-inch ripstop nylon highstart parachute with 225 lb rated SS snap swivel

evidence.snippet:
**18" Ripstop nylon parachute with a 225lb. rated SS snap swivel and a ring in the crown. This chute has 3/8 nylon webbing risers sewn through the crown, it is the strongest Highstart chute available.**
**Item Name:   18" Ripstop Nylon ParachuteItem Number:  HSChutePrice:   $32**
